[console_scripts]
scitex-todo = scitex_todo._cli:main

[scitex_dev.docs]
scitex-todo = scitex_todo

[scitex_dev.jobs]
scitex-todo = scitex_todo._jobs_provider:provide_jobs

[scitex_dev.skills]
scitex-todo = scitex_todo

[scitex_todo.delivery_channels]
log = scitex_todo._delivery._channels.log:LogChannel
telegram = scitex_todo._delivery._channels.telegram:TelegramChannel
